abilities.name: Cover
abilities.description: Once per encounter when an allied Tamer or Digimon is hit by an attack, the Tamer with this class may use their Free Action off-turn to reduce the damage dealt by their Love rank.

abilities.name: Open the Door
abilities.description: Once per round on the Tamer's turn, one allied Tamer of their choice may immediately take a Free Action as if it were their own turn. This does not consume that ally's Free Action for the round.

abilities.name: Cover II
abilities.description: Cover may now be used twice per encounter instead of once.

abilities.name: Not Yet
abilities.description: Once per encounter when an enemy declares an attack against an allied Tamer, the Tamer with this class may use Open the Door off-turn to give that allied Tamer a Free Action before the attack resolves.

abilities.name: Shut Down
abilities.description: When the Tamer with this class uses Cover, the attacker loses their Move Action on their next turn.

abilities.name: Any Time
abilities.description: Open the Door can now be used off-turn as a Free Action — not just on the Tamer's own turn. Once per round regardless of whose turn it is.

abilities.name: All of It
abilities.description: Once per session the Tamer with this class may give up their entire turn. Two allied Tamers of their choice each immediately take a full bonus turn with all of their normal actions available. These bonus turns resolve one at a time in the order the Tamer with this class chooses. The Tamer with this class takes no actions this round.
